hotels.name: Ayres Hotel Orange
hotels.description_fr:
Boasting an outdoor pool and a fitness centre, Ayres Hotel Orange offers spacious guestrooms and suites equipped with free WiFi. A free breakfast buffet is also served. Disneyland Park is 5.7 km away.

A flat-screen cable TV and a seating area with a work desk are included in each air-conditioned accommodation at this hotel. Each guestroom and suite features a microwave, a refrigerator and a coffee machine. The ensuite bathrooms provide free toiletries and a hairdryer.

A 24-hour reception greets guests of Ayres Hotel Orange. Other facilities offered at the property include meeting facilities, dry cleaning and laundry facilities.

The hotel is 2.4 km from Honda Center. John Wayne Airport is 17 km away.
